source_name: Prescription of Amount of Indebtedness of Company under paragraph 466(1)(a) (GN No. 4159 of 2021)
content:
PERENGGAN 466(1)(a)
PRESCRIPTION OF AMOUNT OF INDEBTEDNESS OF COMPANY UNDER
PARAGRAPH 466(1)(a)

source_name: Prescription of Amount of Indebtedness of Company under paragraph 466(1)(a) (GN No. 4159 of 2021)
content:
2016 [Act 777], the Minister prescribes the amount of indebtedness of a
company for the purposes of that paragraph shall be an amount exceeding fifty
thousand ringgit with effect from 1 April 2021.
